text:
Market today: The Dow hit a record, but jobs data was tepid. Tech/chip sentiment is key for your concentrated book.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL (down 28.7%), SMH is HOLD (down 6.9%), SPAL is NEW (down 9.6%). Given your margin concentration, these leveraged names need close watching. QQQI is TRIM (down 1.86%).

Watch: The SMH scanner setup is a BUY signal, aligning with your existing HOLD. Keep an eye on its entry.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions carefully and watch the SMH setup.
plays: SOXL: SELL. This leveraged ETF is down significantly and flagged for attention.
SMH: Consider adding on a dip to the 586.43-584.71 entry if conviction builds; stop 580.88.
